title: nie-bot: main event loop (wire-in)
description:
What: Wire together relay connector, stdin reader, dispatcher, and NDJSON output in main.rs.

Algorithm:
1. In bot/src/main.rs:
   a. Parse CLI flags (clap): --relay, --keyfile, --data-dir, --proxy, --insecure (hidden), --no-passphrase (hidden), --on-message-hook, --self-test
   b. Load config: BotConfig::load(config_dir)?; resolve CLI > env > file > defaults → ResolvedBotConfig
   c. init tracing subscriber with RUST_LOG or config.log_level
   d. Load identity: nie_core::keyfile::load_identity(&config.keyfile, no_passphrase)?
   e. Connect: transport::connect_with_retry(config.relay, identity, insecure, config.proxy) → RelayConnRetry{tx, rx}
   f. Spawn stdin reader: tokio::spawn(stdin_reader::run(cmd_tx, event_tx))
   g. Main loop: tokio::select!:
      - event = conn.rx.recv() → dispatch_notification(event) → if Some(bot_event) { io_types::emit(&bot_event)? }
      - relay Reconnecting/Reconnected → emit BotEvent::Reconnecting/Connected
      - cmd = cmd_rx.recv() → handle_command(cmd, &conn.tx).await
      - event from event_tx (stdin errors) → emit BotEvent::Error
   h. handle_command: Send → serialize ClearMessage::Chat, build BroadcastParams, JsonRpcRequest, conn.tx.send
      SetNickname → SetNicknameParams, Quit → std::process::exit(0)

Defensive:
- conn.rx.recv() returning None means relay conn dropped → emit Disconnected + exit
- Every JsonRpcRequest uses next_request_id() for unique IDs
- Never log identity bytes
- ClearMessage serialization unwrap() is ok (derived Serialize, cannot fail) — add comment

Agent team: R (researcher: read transport.rs, dispatcher.rs, config.rs to verify signatures), I (implementer), V (validator: cargo build + clippy).
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-bot clean; nie-bot --help shows flags; cargo clippy -p nie-bot -- -D warnings clean
